about.description: Our journey began in the heart of Dallas, Texas. With a focus on delivering exceptional roofing solutions for both residential and commercial properties, we pride ourselves on our professionalism and expertise. Whether you need assistance with insurance claims or prefer our competitive retail pricing, rest assured that we have you covered.

image.alt: Apex Roofing & Solar professional roofing team

description: Our journey began in the heart of Dallas, Texas. The owner, Luis Hermocilla, grew tired of greedy contractors overpromising and underdelivering. After working in the roofing industry for several years, he created his own company with a mission to be different.
Founded in 2023, Apex Roofing & Solar aims to be the apex in roofing while providing exemplary service. We take immense pride in providing top-notch service to our valued customers.

Our team's dedication to quality craftsmanship and exceptional customer care sets us apart in the residential and commercial roofing industry. Whether you are dealing with an insurance claim or seeking retail pricing options, you can trust us to deliver unparalleled service from start to finish.

image.alt: Luis Hermocilla - Owner, Apex Roofing & Solar

description: Apex Roofing & Solar offers a comprehensive range of services to meet your roofing needs. From roof inspections and repairs to complete roof replacements, our experienced team ensures top-quality workmanship.

We specialize in shingle roofing, metal roofing, and flat roofing installations. Additionally, we provide gutter cleaning, skylight installation, and attic insulation services to enhance the functionality and longevity of your roof.

services.title: Roof Inspection
services.description: A thorough assessment of your roof, gutters, skylights, chimneys, and property. Identify potential issues before they become costly problems.

services.title: Solar Panel Services
services.description: Need to remove or install solar panels? We are your one-stop shop for all solar roofing needs with professional installation and removal.

services.title: Roof Maintenance & Tune-Ups
services.description: Roof tune-ups including sealing all accessories and exposed nail heads. Gutter cleaning and roof algae cleaning services also available.

section.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
section.description: Expert answers to common questions about roofing, solar, inspections, and our services.

items.question: What roofing services do you offer?
items.answer: Apex Roofing & Solar offers a comprehensive range of roofing services including roof inspections, repairs, complete replacements, shingle roofing, metal roofing, and flat roofing installations. We also provide gutter services, skylight installation, and attic insulation to enhance your roof's functionality and longevity.

items.question: Do you handle solar panel installation and removal?
items.answer: Yes! We are your one-stop shop for solar panel services. Whether you need panels installed on a new or existing roof, or need them removed for roof work, our team handles it all professionally and efficiently.

items.question: Can you help with insurance claims?
items.answer: Absolutely. We assist homeowners and business owners with the insurance claim process. Whether you're dealing with storm damage, hail, or other covered events, we help document the damage, communicate with your insurance provider, and ensure you receive the coverage you deserve.

items.question: How long does a roof replacement take?
items.answer: Most residential roof replacements are completed within one to three days, depending on the size, material type, and weather conditions. Commercial projects may take longer. We provide a clear timeline during your free consultation so you know exactly what to expect.

items.question: What does a roof tune-up include?
items.answer: Our roof tune-up service includes sealing all accessories and exposed nail heads, gutter cleaning, and roof algae cleaning. Regular maintenance extends the life of your roof and prevents minor issues from becoming major problems.

items.question: What is included in a roof inspection?
items.answer: Our thorough roof inspection includes assessment of your roof, gutters, skylights, chimneys, and surrounding property. We identify potential issues, document findings, and provide recommendations to protect your investment.

items.question: What roofing materials do you work with?
items.answer: We specialize in asphalt shingle roofing, metal roofing, and flat roofing systems including TPO and EPDM. During your consultation, we'll help you choose the best material based on your budget, property type, and long-term goals.

items.question: Do you offer gutter cleaning services?
items.answer: Yes, gutter cleaning is part of our maintenance services. Clean gutters are essential for proper water drainage and protecting your roof and foundation from water damage.

items.question: Do you offer free consultations?
items.answer: Yes! We offer free consultations to assess your roofing or solar needs. Contact us by phone at (469) 396-4022 or email Luis@apexroofingandsolar.com to schedule yours today.

items.question: Do you work with retail pricing or only insurance claims?
items.answer: We offer both! Whether you prefer to use your insurance coverage or prefer our competitive retail pricing, we have you covered. We provide transparent pricing with no hidden fees regardless of which option you choose.
